hero.headline: Translation that respects what you actually said.
hero.subhead: A copilot for cross-language messaging that preserves names, register, and meaning. Two passes — literal and natural — and a clear audit of every change. You stay in control of what gets sent.

demo.caption: A quick look at the composer, the dual-pass translation, and the audit list.

step1.title: Type what you mean
step1.body: Write your message in your language. Names, slang, hesitation — all of it. Nuansu translates from your draft, not from a polished version of it.

step2.title: See both passes side by side
step2.body: A literal pass shows what you actually said. A natural pass adapts for fluency. The audit list explains every difference.

step3.title: Refine, accept, or send as-is
step3.body: One tap to apply a change, dismiss it, or rewrite. The original is always recoverable.

proof.title: Built by someone who lives between languages
proof.body: Dogfooded daily on JP↔EN messaging across LINE, Tinder, and the rest. Anti-drift isn't a feature — it's the prime directive.

pricing.title: One plan
pricing.feature_languages: JP ↔ EN to start; more languages coming

faq.title: Common questions
faq.q1: Will the AI rewrite my message?
faq.a1: Never silently. Every change appears in the audit list with a rationale. You decide what gets sent.
faq.a2: Your messages are encrypted at rest with a key that's unique to your account. We never train on your data. See our sub-processors page for the full vendor list.
faq.a3: JP ↔ EN at launch. We're prioritising depth over breadth — more pairs as we get the quality bar right.
faq.q4: Can I export or delete my data?
faq.a4: Yes, both. Export gives you a JSON archive of your chats and audit history. Deletion is a 30-day soft delete; after that the data and the encryption key are destroyed.

privacy_posture.title: Privacy is the first feature, not the last
privacy_posture.body: Per-account encryption keys, zero-data-retention with the LLM provider, full export and deletion. The DPIA is published and counsel-reviewed before public launch.
